nasb.text: The Philistines closely pursued Saul and his sons, and the Philistines struck down Jonathan, Abinadab and Malchi-shua, the sons of Saul.

esv.text: And the Philistines overtook Saul and his sons, and the Philistines struck down Jonathan and Abinadab and Malchi-shua, the sons of Saul.

cnv.text: 非利士人緊緊地追趕掃羅和他的兒子；非利士人殺了掃羅的兒子約拿單、亞比拿達和麥基舒亞。

ccb.text: 非利士人穷追扫罗及其众子，杀了扫罗的儿子约拿单、亚比拿达和麦基舒亚。
